Selenophile Cafe
Features Community Book Now

Work, Dine, and Connect in BTM’s Favorite Hidden Gem

Experience the perfect blend of artisanal continental cuisine, premium barista coffee, and a serene co-working environment designed for productivity and play.

Explore Our Space

Why Startups Love Us

Productive Hub

High-speed free Wi-Fi and dedicated meeting rooms for seamless WFH sessions.

Signature Menu

From authentic Turkish Kunafa to creamy Pesto Pasta and gourmet burgers.

Networking

Regular mixers designed to help freelancers and entrepreneurs connect.

Entertainment

Board games and Rubik's cubes to enjoy while your fresh meal is prepared.

What Our Community Says

"A hidden gem for WFH folks. Cozy working space, great coffee, and the signature Kunafa is a must-try!"

— Startup Founder

"The networking mixers have been beneficial for my freelance business. Best place for meetings in BTM."

— Freelance Designer

"Amazing food and service. The environment is so calm and cool, perfect for getting work done."

— Remote Developer

Ready to Experience Selenophile?

Whether you're craving our signature Kunafa or need a quiet corner for Co-working, we're ready for you.
